title: request: Add KG-14 author-to-file edges in provenance graph

plan.summary: Implement KG-14 by adding deterministic author nodes and weighted author-to-file provenance edges, with focused tests and a small roadmap doc update.
steps: Inspect current provenance graph edge conventions and choose an additive edge type/name for author-to-file links.
Extend scripts/provenance_graph.py to collect commit author identity from git log, add author nodes, and emit weighted author-to-file edges for indexed files only.
Update shared graph edge handling if reach/provenance helpers should traverse the new edge type.
Add tests covering author nodes, author-to-file edges, weights, and stats without adding dependencies.
Update the knowledge graph plan to mark KG-14 complete and run python3 run_tests.py.
commit_plan: test: cover author provenance graph edges (#46)
docs: mark KG-14 author edges complete (#46)
